mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_USER_LOGIN_HISTORY (USER_ID, EVENT_TYPE, IP_ADDRESS, USER_AGENT, CREATED_AT) VALUES (#{userId}, #{action}, #{ipAddress}, #{userAgent}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.select: SELECT HISTORY_ID AS historyId, USER_ID AS userId, EVENT_TYPE AS action, IP_ADDRESS AS ipAddress, USER_AGENT AS userAgent, CREATED_AT AS createdAt FROM TB_USER_LOGIN_HISTORY WHERE CREATED_AT < #{before} ORDER BY CREATED_AT ASC
